title: Defect capture + Work Queue (UI)
prompt: Install mes-defect-demo, capture a defect from the operator screen, and confirm a workflow task lands in Work Queue.
uiJourney: Solutions → Deploy mes-defect-demo → Operator → Work Queue
humanSteps: Open Operator for mes-defect-demo; submit a defect record.
Open Work Queue and confirm the defect workflow task.
